aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and clear contact information, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and structured data optimization.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews and improve trust signals.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords related to HVAC services in Orlando.
Enhance content with location-specific keywords and detailed service descriptions.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has contact information and a phone number, but lacks a consistent Google Business Profile (GBP) listing.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP listing is a significant gap. A GBP is crucial for local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: Missing location-specific content and local SEO optimization.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on the website, but lacks citations across major directories and local listings.
action_items: Create and verify GBP listing with accurate NAP information.
Build citations on major directories like Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local business directories.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and social media profiles.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema for the business.
Missing Service schema for specific HVAC services offered.
No FAQPage schema for common customer questions.
No Review schema to showcase customer testimonials.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of content depth and keyword optimization for HVAC services in Orlando.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local customers searching for HVAC services in Orlando due to missing GBP and local citations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing meta tags with location-specific keywords.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative blog content about HVAC maintenance, energy efficiency, and local climate considerations to establish the business as a local authority.

page_title: Orlando Air Conditioning Repairs | 24/7 HVAC Service
